Enrollment and Summary
Privacy Level: 
Research Identifiable Files

Availability of this file

Availability: 
1999-2024*
*Data is only available to CCW VRDC users, and cannot be shipped.
The MESF NDI file is not available for all states in all years. In some cases, states did not have data available at the time the death date cohort was pulled.
2011-2013 CA and UT reported no death dates and are excluded for these years.
2011 – 48 states, includes all states except CA, CO, UT
2012 – 45 states,
